classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是连接器针脚分配表，全图对应位置标注为'17 PIN Encoder Connector'；表中包含Pin、Fuction、COLOR列，并给出1至17号针脚与R+、R-、COS+、COS-、SIN+、SIN-、NC及线色ORANGE、WHITE、RED、BLACK、BLUE、YELLOW的对应关系，属于编码器反馈接口信号定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为标注'YL221ZJ'和'17 PIN'的17针圆形连接器针位示意，孔位内可见1至17等编号；结合完整图中该区域属于'17 PIN Encoder Connector'，表示编码器反馈接口的针位布局。

dimension_records.reason: Pin numbering label for 17-pin encoder connector, consistent with existing labels L004-L020 showing pins 1-17

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 17-pin encoder connector (YL221ZJ) with circular pin layout. Pin 1 identified in layout diagram. Complete pin numbering 1-17 visible in existing labels.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR detected low-confidence fragments ('7' and 'e') that do not correspond to legitimate pin numbers or dimensions in the visible layout

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.40) OCR fragment at unusual angle (165.96°), does not correspond to visible pin label or dimension. Pin 7 already labeled in existing_labels (L010). Likely structural line misidentification.

Single character 'e' with large bbox (93x60 px) covering multiple pin positions. Does not match any visible text, dimension, or label in target image. Likely misidentification of connector body outline or internal structure.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是动力接口针脚分配表，表头含 'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，行内将针脚 1-4 分别对应 U、V、W、PE 及线色 YELLOW、RED、BLACK、YELLOW/GREEN，完整源图中该区域位于 '6 Pin Power Connector' 标注下，符合动力连接器接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域显示圆形6针连接器的外形和孔位编号，并标注型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'及'6 PIN'；虽然完整源图中该区域位于6 Pin Power Connector组内，但目标框内未包含针脚功能、线色或接线定义，因此按连接器外形及位置类信息归入机械尺寸。

title.title_zh: 6针动力连接器外形及针位图

drawing_metadata.authority: IMAGE 1 is the only source for text and coordinates

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve exact visible text including Chinese, symbols, tolerances, and units
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Assume millimeters for mechanical drawings unless otherwise specified

terminology_rules.connector_type: Use 'circular connector' for round multi-pin connectors
terminology_rules.pin_numbering: Preserve visible pin numbers as shown in drawing

Number of electrical contacts in connector

shaft_and_key_interface.en: Not applicable - this is a connector detail.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 显示 6 针圆形连接器的前视图，标注了引脚位置 1 至 6。连接器型号为 YL2046ZJ-Y。外形尺寸需参考其他视图。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: Shows front view of 6-pin circular connector with pin positions numbered 1 through 6. Connector model is YL2046ZJ-Y. Overall envelope dimensions should be referenced from other views.

connector_considerations.zh: 6 针圆形电源连接器，型号 YL2046ZJ-Y。引脚布局清晰标注，编号从 1 至 6。需从完整图纸获取配合尺寸、引脚规格和电气额定值。
connector_considerations.en: 6-pin circular power connector, model YL2046ZJ-Y. Pin layout clearly marked with numbers 1 through 6. Mating dimensions, pin specifications, and electrical ratings should be obtained from complete drawing set.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少：连接器外径、引脚接触直径、配合深度、电气规格。此区域仅显示引脚布局和型号识别。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Missing: Connector outer diameter, pin contact diameter, mating depth, electrical specifications. This region shows only pin layout and model identification.

frontend_table_records.specification: Pins numbered 1 through 6 per layout diagram

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框是电机技术参数表，包含可用于性能识别的 'Rated Torque TN (N. m)'、'Maximum torque Tm (N.m)'、'Standstill torque Ts (N.m)'、'Rated Speed Nn (rpm)' 等扭矩与转速数据；在给定类别中最接近电机扭矩转速性能信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机外形与法兰安装尺寸图，包含侧视图、端面视图、轴径和轴长尺寸、外径尺寸、安装孔和螺纹深度，如'336±1.5'、'84.5±1'、'φ200±0.15'、'M8 Deep 25'、'4-φ13'等；连接器文字仅标注安装位置和外形位置，没有针脚功能或线色定义。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Motor has φ200±0.15mm flange with 4-φ13mm mounting holes on 180mm bolt circle at 45° positions. M8 threaded holes 25mm deep for secondary mounting. Center height 79±0.1mm.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft φ114.3 0/-0.035mm outer diameter, φ42 0/-0.016mm end diameter. No keyway explicitly dimensioned in this region.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall length 336±1.5mm, maximum length 204mm. Flange diameter φ200±0.15mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 17-pin encoder connector and 6-pin motor connector labeled. Specific locations and orientations visible but no dimensional callouts for connector positions.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Keyway dimensions not shown in this region. Shaft length not explicitly dimensioned. Connector mounting details not dimensioned.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence OCR fragment 'Q' with conf 0.257, appears to be noise or structure misread
Low confidence OCR '?1' with conf 0.656, likely misread near mounting hole area, does not correspond to clear dimension

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为带坐标轴和网格的电机扭矩-转速性能曲线，纵轴标注'T (N.m)'，横轴标注'n (rpm)'，曲线分别标出'Intermittent'和'Continuous'工作区，并包含'96.25'、'87.5'、'38.5'、'35'、'2200'等扭矩和转速节点。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR detected '8', corrected to '87.5' based on graph context

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Torque in N.m, Speed in rpm

terminology_notes: n (rpm) represents rotational speed in revolutions per minute
Intermittent refers to intermittent duty operating mode
Continuous refers to continuous duty operating mode
translation_notes: All numerical values and units preserved as shown in drawing
Graph shows two operating modes with different torque-speed characteristics

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This drawing shows torque-speed performance characteristics for intermittent and continuous operating modes. Intermittent mode: 96.25 N.m at start, 87.5 N.m at inflection, reaching 0 at 2200 rpm. Continuous mode: 38.5 N.m at start, 35 N.m at inflection, reaching 0 at 2200 rpm. Both curves show decreasing torque with increasing speed.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸右下标题栏中的未注公差区，包含可见文本 'TOLERANCES:'、'DECIMALS:'、'.X ±0.5'、'.XX ±0.25'、'.XXX ±0.1'、'ANGULAR: ±0°30''、'UNIT: mm'，用于说明机械尺寸和角度的默认公差，属于机械尺寸类信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
